promotion_rules.backlog_to_level_1: immediate when valid approved backlog item is processed
promotion_rules.level_2_office_handoff: Ana places the Level 2 Trainee in the correct office and hands the item to Cole
promotion_rules.cole_level_2_to_level_3: Cole welcomes the person, verifies required file/readiness gates, records proof, and promotes to Level 3 Staff
promotion_rules.level_3_to_level_4: not allowed by Ana or Cole Level 4

boundaries: Ana has no authority beyond Level 2 Trainee; Cole may promote Level 2 Trainees to Level 3 Staff only after readiness checks
